query_title: Friday the 13th Part VII - The New Blood

recommendations.title: Ghoulies III: Ghoulies Go to College
recommendations.overview: A college teacher brings the little creatures back to his campus, where they proceed to terrorize the faculty and students.

recommendations.title: Troll
recommendations.overview: When a family moves into a San Francisco apartment, an opportunistic troll decides to make his move and take possession of little Wendy, thereby paving the way for new troll recruits, the first in his army that will take eventual control of the plane

recommendations.title: Room
recommendations.overview: Held captive for 7 years in an enclosed space, a woman and her young son finally gain their freedom, allowing the boy to experience the outside world for the first time.

recommendations.title: Badlands
recommendations.overview: An impressionable teenage girl from a dead-end town and her older greaser boyfriend embark on a killing spree in the South Dakota badlands.

recommendations.title: Carrie
recommendations.overview: An awkward, telekinetic teenage girl is the object of relentless bullying at school and an oppressively religious mother at home.

recommendations.title: Anguish
recommendations.overview: An ophthalmologist's assistant with an unhealthy interest in human eyeballs goes on a killing spree to collect eyeballs for his overbearing mother's collection. Reality soon takes a bizarre turn, both for the characters and the audience.

recommendations.title: God Bless America
recommendations.overview: Fed up with the cruelty and stupidity of American culture, an unlikely duo goes on a killing spree, killing reality TV stars, bigots and others they find repugnant.

recommendations.title: Nightmare
recommendations.overview: A drug-treated schizophrenic plagued by horrible nightmares is released from the hospital and goes on a killing spree.

recommendations.title: Strange Darling
recommendations.overview: Nothing is what it seems when a twisted one-night stand spirals into a serial killer’s vicious murder spree.

recommendations.title: Old People
recommendations.overview: A woman who's returned home with her two kids to attend her sister's wedding must suddenly defend their lives against older people on a killing spree.
